Pricing

Simple pricing for teams that want a clearer growth operating system.

Choose the plan that matches how your team works today, then expand as reporting needs, coordination complexity, and visibility requirements grow.

Get started →Book a demo
All pricing, packaging, and feature bundles shown here are illustrative for the prototype.

For lean teams that want cleaner reporting and a simpler operating baseline.

Growth

Scale
For larger or more complex environments that need guided packaging and broader coordination support.

Clear next step
Self-serve interest where possible, guided conversations where complexity is higher.
Plans

Three straightforward ways to buy Growthforge.

The product packaging is designed to feel commercially believable and easy to understand without forcing the page to explain every edge case before a buyer can see the options.

For lean teams getting organized
Starter
$49
/seat/mo

A lighter starting point for smaller teams that want one place to review the basics.

Core CRM records
Basic lifecycle visibility
Starter reporting dashboards
Standard integrations

Most practical starting point
For scaling teams that need cross-functional clarity
Growth
$99
/seat/mo

The main Growthforge plan for teams that want stronger channel, funnel, and reporting coordination.

Full CRM, marketing, sales, and reporting
Deeper lifecycle visibility
Cross-functional dashboards
Advanced workflow support

For larger or more complex operating environments

pricing

A guided commercial path for teams that need broader controls, deeper reporting, and custom packaging.

Expanded admin controls
Advanced reporting
Broader coordination support

Talk to salesBook a demo
What buyers need

The goal is simple: make fit easier to understand.

A strong pricing page should help visitors understand which plan is likely right for them, what they get, and whether the next step is self-serve or a conversation.

Clearer fit signals
See quickly whether you are a lighter, scaling, or more complex use case.
Stronger commercial trust
Direct pricing makes the product feel more real and easier to evaluate.
Better next-step routing
Let buyers move naturally into self-serve exploration or a guided sales conversation.
Commercial trust

Specific enough to feel real. Simple enough to stay readable.

The pricing layer should support trust without collapsing into a wall of billing logic, fine print, or fake enterprise complexity.

No fake complexity
Avoid packaging that feels bigger or more complicated than the product story actually requires.
Enough structure to sell
Illustrative prices, plan names, and package boundaries do the main trust-building work.
Aligned with the product
The commercial model should reflect the same platform logic the rest of the site already communicates.
Pricing FAQ

A few practical questions the page should answer clearly.

These are the questions most buyers want answered before deciding whether to keep exploring or book time with a human.

Is the pricing on this site real?
No. Pricing, packaging, and features shown here are illustrative for the prototype.
Can teams expand later?
Yes. The pricing model is framed so teams can grow into broader capability as operating complexity increases.
Is there a guided sales path?
Yes. The Scale plan is the clearest example of a path that would typically involve a conversation.
Are integrations or support included?
Support and integrations are represented at an illustrative level to make the packaging feel realistic without overbuilding the page.
Why this pricing model

The page should feel more direct than theoretical.

The best pricing pages help buyers understand the decision in front of them instead of explaining the philosophy of pricing for half the scroll.

Faster clarity
Visitors should be able to understand the offer in a glance before they start comparing details.
More believable packaging
Simple, concrete plan names and visible pricing strengthen the commercial story quickly.
Cleaner conversion path
A direct page makes it easier for interested buyers to choose between self-serve exploration and a demo.
Pricing

Choose the plan that fits now, then grow from there.

Explore the packages, compare fit, and book a demo if you want a guided walkthrough of how Growthforge could support your team.

Growthforge

Growthforge is a sample/demo growth platform concept designed to unify SEO, paid search, funnel visibility, reporting, and recommendations in one clearer operating system.
